_note: Agent playbook + workspace conventions. Generic + editable. Exposed over MCP (resource cairn://playbook + tool get_conventions/get_workspace) so an agent that connects instantly knows the rules.

branch.note: One branch per feature. <slug> = short kebab-case of the feature (e.g. feature/ai-whatsapp).

worktree.note: One git worktree per feature; remove it after merge. Marker WORKTREE_OK in a command = standing owner approval.

commit: Conventional commits, one per verified unit of work.
merge: Live repo: worktree+branch -> merge -> delete worktree. Planned repos: work on develop, merge to main on release.
usage: Read first: list_queue() = what is active now / next; get_feature(id) = the task list + who is on it.
Claim your work: upsert_run({id, agentType, model, effort, task, feature, status:'running'}) so humans see who is on what, on which model, at what effort.
Report progress: toggle_task({featureId, index}) ONLY with program-emitted evidence. append_activity for milestones.
Need a human call or blocked: open_decision({featureId, question, options}) or set_blocked({featureId, reason}). Never fake done.
Leave a note for the human or another agent: add_comment({featureId, author, text}).
Finish: set your run status to 'done'.
deploy: Project-specific. Ibils Personal = GitHub Actions self-hosted runner; never manual server rebuild; never deploy from develop.
